description: Periodic CDD refresh for existing retail customer resulting in a risk upgrade from Low to Medium with Enhanced Due Diligence now required
parsed_text:
PERIODIC CDD REFRESH — RISK RATING CHANGE NOTIFICATION
Customer Name: Beverly Okafor
Customer Type: Individual
Customer Since: 2019-03-04
Date of Birth: 1977-06-19   SSN: XXX-XX-9933
Address: 1045 Maple Grove Avenue, Columbus, OH 43215, USA
Phone: (614) 555-0177   Email: b.okafor@example.com
Occupation (Updated): Sole Proprietor — Okafor Wellness Consulting (Est. 2023)
Prior Occupation on File: Registered Nurse, OhioHealth System (2019–2022)
Source of Funds (Updated): Business consulting income, freelance coaching fees
Expected Monthly Activity (Updated): $42,000 (prior: $7,500)

PRIOR RISK PROFILE
Prior Risk Rating: Low
Prior CDD Level: Standard
Last Review Date: 2023-01-10   Last Reviewer: Craig Dobbs

CHANGE TRIGGERS IDENTIFIED AT REFRESH
1. Significant increase in expected monthly activity: $7,500 → $42,000 (+460%).
2. Change in occupation: Salaried nurse to self-employed sole proprietor.
3. Transaction monitoring alert (TMA-2025-XXXX4401): Three cash deposits exceeding $8,000 each within 30-day period (September 2025) — pattern inconsistent with prior profile.
4. New wire activity to international beneficiary (Jamaica) not previously observed.

RISK REASSESSMENT
Analyst: Yolanda Prescott, CDD Analyst II
Reassessment Date: 2025-10-28
Findings:
- Change in occupation to self-employed increases income variability risk.
- Transaction volume increase without prior notification triggers profile review requirement.
- International wire (Jamaica) — Jamaica is not on high-risk country list but adds geographic complexity.
- TMA alerts reviewed: Cash deposits consistent with stated consulting revenue (three client checks converted to cash prior to deposit, explained in customer interview 2025-10-25).
- No adverse media. No PEP status. OFAC/SDN clear.

UPDATED RISK PROFILE
New Risk Rating: Medium (upgraded from Low)
New CDD Level: Enhanced Due Diligence — required due to risk upgrade per policy section 7.2
EDD Actions Required:
1. Updated source of wealth / income documentation collected (2024 tax return, consulting contracts).
2. Customer interview completed 2025-10-25 — explanation of cash deposit pattern documented.
3. International wire beneficiary verification: Jamaica beneficiary identified as Ms. Okafor's mother (Maud Okafor) — family support transfer, consistent documentation provided.
4. Ongoing transaction monitoring frequency increased from annual to semi-annual.

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS
ID Type: Driver License   ID Number: DL-OH-XX7712   Expiration: 2029-06-30
Documents re-verified at refresh — no change.

SCREENING (AT REFRESH)
OFAC / SDN: Clear.
PEP Status: No — Beverly Okafor is not a PEP.
Adverse Media: Clear.

PEP Status: No
Review Date: 2025-10-28   Reviewer: Yolanda Prescott

expected_json.source_of_funds: Business consulting income, freelance coaching fees
